title: Zucchini Pasta with Crispy Italian Breading
description: A simple and flavorful pasta dish made with zucchini, crispy breading, and a hint of Italian seasonings.

ingredients.name: Pasta
ingredients.notes: Bow tie or penne work well

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
While the pasta cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced zucchini to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
In a shallow dish, mix together the crispy Italian breading and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Once the pasta is done cooking, drain it and add it to the skillet with the zucchini.
Toss the pasta and zucchini with the crispy breading until well coated.
